data.name: Arguments
data.value: Parameter's argument specifications. Following values are acceptable: - `IArgumentCompleter` implementation object - list candidates of `string`|`CompletionValue` - `ScriptBlock` - HashTable (can be converted to `IArgumentCompleter`) e.g.) - `@{ Name = "path"; Type = 'File' }` - `@{ Name = "VariableName"; Script = { <# CompletionScript #> } }` - `@{ Name = "VariableName"; Candidates = "list", "of", "candidates" }`

data.name: Style
data.value: Specify Parameter style. If ommited, inhertes from the parent CommandCompleter's style.

data.name: Error.NotSpecifiedAnyParameterNames
data.value: At least one of 'StarndardName', 'LongName' or 'ShortName' must be specified.
